steps.title: Calculate annual deposits from each account
steps.content:
Account 1: Micah deposits $x$ dollars once each month. Over 12 months, that's $12x$.
Account 2: Micah deposits $y$ dollars twice monthly, which is $2y$ per month. Over 12 months: $2y \cdot 12 = 24y$ dollars.

steps.title: Set up the equation for total deposits
steps.content: Combining both accounts, the total equation is $$6,600 = 12x + 24y$$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
